blurb_en:
Four days after OpenAI filed its IPO paperwork, a coalition of 42 state attorneys general served the company a subpoena — requesting documents on advertising, children's data, user engagement, and a ChatGPT behavior called sycophancy.
• The investigation is led by New York AG Letitia James; 41 other states joined.
• Sycophancy — the tendency of ChatGPT to tell users what they want to hear rather than what's true — was named as a designed product feature under scrutiny, not an accidental glitch.
• Florida already filed its own standalone lawsuit on June 1, naming CEO Sam Altman personally and alleging ChatGPT helped plan a mass shooting.
• OpenAI says it's engaging constructively with the AGs. It is also preparing a September IPO, which means it has very little room to push back.
• The probe is likely to surface as a material risk disclosure in OpenAI's S-1 — a sentence Altman would prefer not to exist.
• For Insta360: US regulatory pressure on OpenAI creates real breathing room for Chinese AI products in markets where US tools already face headwinds.
blurb_zh:
OpenAI提交IPO申请四天后，42个州检察长联名向其发出传票，要求提供广告做法、用户数据、未成年人保护以及ChatGPT谄媚设计的相关文件。
• 此次调查由纽约州检察长莱蒂西亚·詹姆斯主导，另有41个州联署参与。
• 谄媚特性——ChatGPT倾向于顺着用户说、而非纠正错误——被传票明确列为有意为之的产品设计，而非意外缺陷。
• 佛罗里达已于6月1日单独起诉OpenAI，并直接点名CEO萨姆·奥特曼，指控ChatGPT助长了一起枪击案的策划。
• OpenAI表示将积极配合调查。这家公司正在准备9月上市，别无选择。
• 对Insta360而言：美国对OpenAI的监管收紧，将给Kimi、豆包等国内AI产品带来更多市场空间。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch June 13, Bloomberg June 13, CNBC June 12. NY AG Letitia James confirmed as lead, 42-state coalition confirmed, sycophancy named in subpoena per TechTimes June 14.

blurb_en:
Canada's Privacy Commissioner found on June 11 that Grok, Elon Musk's xAI image generator, produced over 6,000 sexualized deepfakes per hour of real people — without consent, without warning, and in violation of federal law.
• The investigation began in January after reports that Grok had generated millions of non-consensual deepfake images, many targeting women and children.
• X Corp. and xAI launched the image tool without adequate safeguards, per the ruling. This is a legal finding, not an opinion piece.
• Grok introduced protective measures and content sweeps only after the investigation was underway. The standard sequence: release, backlash, patch.
• California's attorney general has separately launched an investigation into Grok's explicit image generation.
• For Insta360: deepfakes are made from real photos and real videos. Camera companies sit at the upstream end of this supply chain — a fact that is becoming a regulatory question, not just an ethical one.
blurb_zh:
加拿大隐私专员于6月11日裁定，马斯克旗下xAI图像工具Grok在未经本人同意的情况下生成性化深度伪造图片，峰值每小时超过6000张，违反联邦隐私法。
• 此次调查始于1月，起因是Grok被大规模用于生成针对女性和儿童的非法图像，数量以百万计。
• 官方裁定：xAI在发布工具时未建立必要的安全保护机制——这是法律结论，不是舆论批评。
• 调查期间，xAI才补充上线内容过滤功能：先发布，再合规，一贯套路。
• 加州检察长已对Grok单独启动调查。
• 对Insta360而言：深度伪造的原材料来自真实照片和视频，相机企业在这条产业链上处于上游——这正在从道德问题演变为监管问题。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Canadian Privacy Commissioner official news release (priv.gc.ca nr-c_260611), CBC News June 11, BNN Bloomberg June 11, Al Jazeera June 11, Global News June 11.

blurb_en:
The top 1% of US companies by AI adoption spend $7,500 per employee per month on AI tools and compute. The median US company spends $11.38, per Ramp's June 2026 AI Index, published June 10.
• The data is from actual business credit card and billing records across tens of thousands of US companies — not a survey.
• DeepSeek topped Ramp's trending software vendors in June, suggesting cost-conscious companies are hunting for the cheapest path to the same output.
• Anthropic grew to 41% of US businesses with paid AI subscriptions — now the most adopted enterprise AI model, up from 34% in May.
• The $7,500 cohort runs AI agents, API compute, and infrastructure. The $11 cohort probably has a Canva subscription and a free ChatGPT tier.
• Ramp updated the index this month to track spending intensity rather than just adoption share, as AI penetration approaches 100% of US businesses.
• For Insta360: the companies spending $7,500 per employee are not using AI to generate photos — they're using it to run their business. That distinction is becoming permanent.
blurb_zh:
Ramp 2026年6月AI指数（6月10日发布）显示，美国AI采用率前1%的企业每月人均AI支出达7500美元，普通企业中位数仅11.38美元。
• 数据来源是真实的企业信用卡账单，涉及数万家美国公司，非问卷调查。
• DeepSeek在6月成为Ramp上增速最快的AI软件，说明注重成本的企业正在找性价比最高的替代方案。
• Anthropic企业采用率升至41%，超越OpenAI成为美国企业最多采用的AI工具，较5月的34%进一步提升。
• 花7500美元的企业在跑AI代理、基础设施和API；花11美元的大概买了个Canva会员。
• 对Insta360而言：高投入的那批企业正在用AI管理整个业务运营，而不只是生成内容——这个分水岭正在固化。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch June 10, The Next Web (thenextweb.com/news/ai-pilled-firms-7500-per-employee-spending), Ramp AI Index June 2026 (ramp.com/leading-indicators/ai-index-june-2026).

blurb_en:
Huawei unveiled HarmonyOS 7 at its HDC 2026 developer conference on June 12, turning its Xiaoyi assistant into a system-level AI agent with 2,100 native capabilities and 2,000+ third-party AI skills on call.
• The new interaction paradigm is called Intent as Service — users describe what they want in one sentence, and Xiaoyi decomposes the task and routes it across apps and services without further input.
• The underlying foundation model, openPangu 2.0, ships in two versions: 505 billion parameters (Pro) and 92 billion (Flash), with 512K context windows on both.
• Huawei claims 90%+ completion rates for complex, multi-step agentic tasks — the kind that normally require opening three apps and logging into two of them.
• HarmonyOS 7 also converts photos into depth-based interactive 3D lock-screen effects — a feature Apple just introduced in iOS 27.
• Consumer release is set for fall 2026, shipping with the Huawei Mate 90 series.
• For Insta360: Huawei is a Shenzhen neighbor and direct competitor in the imaging market. The AI photo features in HarmonyOS 7 will raise the floor on what users expect from smart cameras.
blurb_zh:
华为于6月12日2026华为开发者大会上发布鸿蒙OS 7，将小艺助手升级为系统级AI代理，原生覆盖2100项系统能力，并可调用2000余个第三方AI技能。
• 新交互范式命名为以意待命：用户描述意图，小艺自动拆解任务、跨应用执行，无需分步操作。
• 底层基础模型盘古大模型2.0分两档：Pro版5050亿参数、Flash版920亿参数，均支持512K上下文。
• 华为宣称复杂多步骤任务AI完成率超90%。
• 鸿蒙OS 7还支持将照片转化为3D锁屏动态效果，与苹果iOS 27上周推出的空间摄影功能直接对标。
• 正式版将于2026年秋季随华为Mate 90系列发布。
• 对Insta360而言：华为是深圳邻居也是成像领域的直接竞争者，鸿蒙OS 7的AI影像功能将直接抬高用户对智能相机能力的预期门槛。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Pandaily June 12, Gizmochina June 12, Huawei Central June 12, IntoMobile June 12, NPowerUser June 12 — all reporting from HDC 2026 developer conference.

blurb_en:
EngineAI, a three-year-old Shenzhen robotics startup, filed confidentially for a Hong Kong IPO on June 12, one week after opening a factory that produces one humanoid robot every 15 minutes.
• The company raised $200 million in a Series B in April at a valuation above 10 billion yuan ($1.5 billion).
• The Shenzhen factory targets 10,000 units annually; the T800 is its first commercial product — and yes, it can do a frontflip.
• EngineAI is not alone: Agibot is targeting a Q3 2026 Hong Kong listing and Unitree has filed for a $7 billion IPO. Chinese humanoid robot companies are queuing for public markets simultaneously.
• They chose Hong Kong, not New York. That choice says something about where the capital is.
• For Insta360: these companies share Insta360's Shenzhen manufacturing DNA. If Chinese humanoid robots reach mass production before Western equivalents, the downstream effects on hardware assembly — including cameras — are real.
blurb_zh:
深圳人形机器人初创公司EngineAI于6月12日秘密提交香港IPO申请，时间节点在其工厂开业仅一周后——该工厂每15分钟可下线一台人形机器人。
• 公司于今年4月完成2亿美元B轮融资，估值超100亿元人民币（约15亿美元）。
• 深圳工厂年产目标1万台，首款商用机器人T800已开始量产，能翻跟斗。
• 同期排队香港上市的还有智元机器人（目标2026年Q3）和宇树机器人（已申请70亿美元IPO），中国人形机器人正在集体冲刺上市。
• 上市地点选择香港而非纽约，资本在哪里答案自明。
• 对Insta360而言：这些都是深圳制造业的同类企业。若中国率先实现人形机器人量产，下游硬件——包括相机——的组装模式将随之改变。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Bloomberg June 12 (paywall), The Next Web June 12, Investing.com June 12, Startup Fortune, EconoTimes, Asia Business Daily.
